section_name: General Applicability of Chapter to Commercial Motor Vehicles
text: This chapter applies to a commercial motor vehicle inspection program established under Section 548.201 (Commercial Motor Vehicle Inspection Program) except as otherwise provided.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 548. Inspection of Vehicles
##### § 548.202 — General Applicability of Chapter to Commercial Motor Vehicles

This chapter applies to a commercial motor vehicle inspection program established under Section 548.201 (Commercial Motor Vehicle Inspection Program) except as otherwise provided.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: This chapter applies to a commercial motor vehicle inspection program established under Section 548.201 (Commercial Motor Vehicle Inspection Program) except as otherwise provided.
